title: The Next Threat Emerges

scene: The scene focuses on the next threat emerges, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please, follow after me, Sir corpse !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I am not sure if this is

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Who are you calling a corpse!!

summary: The Next Threat Emerges. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
